# @pautena/react-design-system

AI-ready design system built on shadcn/ui and Base UI, with MCP registry support.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @pautena/react-design-system
```

Import the stylesheet once:

```ts
import "@pautena/react-design-system/styles.css";
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { Header, ValueCard, ValueText } from "@pautena/react-design-system";

<Header title="Operations" subtitle="Live metrics" />
<ValueCard>
  <ValueText label="Users" value="1,240" />
</ValueCard>;
```

## Component catalog (high-level)

- Layout: Header, HeaderLayout, DrawerLayout, Content
- Data display: ValueText, ValueCard, ValueBoolean, ValueDatetime, Board
- Forms: TextField, Select, Autocomplete
- Navigation: TabCard, TabPanel, ListPanel
- Dialogs: Dialog, ConfirmDialog, FormDialog
- Feedback: NotificationCenter, ExpandableAlert, Skeletons
- Tables: RemoteDataTable

## MCP registry

- Manifest: https://react-design-system.pautena.com/registry/index.json
- Component JSON: https://react-design-system.pautena.com/registry/value-card.json

## Examples

- Storybook: Examples section
